STAFF REPORT — Planning Commission
File: CUP 24-031
Applicant: Coastal Surf School, LLC
Location: 415 N. El Camino Real
Request: Authorize commercial surf instruction.
Recommendation: Approve subject to conditions.
Fiscal Impact: None.

STAFF REPORT — Council
File: AGR 26-014
Applicant: ClearStreet Services, Inc.
Location: City-wide
Request: 3-year street sweeping services agreement.
Recommendation: Approve.
Fiscal Impact: $1,275,000 over the term.

STAFF REPORT — Council
File: GPA 25-002
Applicant: City of San Clemente
Location: El Camino Real corridor
Request: Amend General Plan to allow mixed-use.
Recommendation: Adopt resolution.
Fiscal Impact: Minor staff time.

STAFF REPORT — Planning Commission
File: DR 25-118
Applicant: Hernandez Family Trust
Location: 2210 Camino Capistrano
Request: New 4-unit residential building.
Recommendation: Approve with conditions.
Fiscal Impact: Permit fees collected.

STAFF REPORT — Council
File: BUDG 26-2
Applicant: Public Works Department
Location: Citywide storm drains
Request: Mid-year appropriation for emergency repairs.
Recommendation: Appropriate $1,800,000 from General Fund reserve.
Fiscal Impact: $1,800,000.

PLANNING COMMISSION STAFF REPORT — SUP 2026-118
Applicant: Bayou Bend Catering LLC
Location: 4412 Westheimer Rd, Houston TX
Request: Specific Use Permit for outdoor catering events on weekends.
Recommendation: Approve subject to conditions.
Fiscal Impact: $0 (cost recovery via application fee).

AUSTIN PLANNING COMMISSION — Staff Report C14-26-0042
Applicant: Pinetree Holdings, LP
Location: 1812 E 12th St, Austin TX 78702
Request: Rezoning from MF-3 to MF-4 to allow a 78-unit affordable housing project.
Recommendation: Recommend approval with conditions limiting height to 60 feet.
Fiscal Impact: None to City General Fund; project utilizes 4% LIHTC.

document_text:
DENVER CITY COUNCIL — Staff Report Bill 26-0188
Applicant: Department of Safety (sponsor)
Location: City-wide deployment
Request: Authorize a five-year contract with Axon Enterprise, Inc. for police body-worn cameras.
Recommendation: Approve, not to exceed $9,800,000 over the term.
Fiscal Impact: $9,800,000 over five years from the Department of Safety operating budget.

gold_json.fiscal_impact: $9,800,000 over five years from the Department of Safety operating budget

document_text:
BOSTON ZONING BOARD OF APPEAL — Case BZC-2026-091
Applicant: 484 Tremont LLC
Location: 484 Tremont Street, Boston MA 02116
Request: Variance to permit a fifth-story addition exceeding the 35-ft B-2 height limit.
Recommendation: Deny — does not meet hardship criteria under Article 7.
Fiscal Impact: None.

PORTLAND BPS — CP-26-007 Staff Report
Applicant: Bureau of Planning & Sustainability (initiated)
Location: City-wide Comprehensive Plan amendment
Request: Update transportation-element policies to align with Climate Emergency Workplan.
Recommendation: Forward to Council for adoption.
Fiscal Impact: Implementation costs estimated at $4.2M over FY27-29; funding TBD via JTA.

gold_json.fiscal_impact: Implementation $4.2M over FY27-29; funding TBD via JTA

document_text:
PHOENIX PLANNING COMMISSION — GPA 26-014
Applicant: Reinvent Phoenix Initiative
Location: 1.8-acre parcel at 7th Ave & Indian School Rd, Phoenix AZ 85013
Request: General plan amendment from Medium to High Density Residential.
Recommendation: Approve, consistent with transit-oriented corridor objectives.
Fiscal Impact: None — privately-financed redevelopment.

gold_json.location: 7th Ave & Indian School Rd, Phoenix AZ 85013

document_text:
CUYAHOGA COUNTY — Resolution R-2026-058 Staff Memo
Applicant: Department of Public Works
Location: Former metals-processing site, 1820 Industrial Pkwy
Request: Authorize a remediation contract with Northcoast Environmental LLC.
Recommendation: Approve, not to exceed $4,200,000.
Fiscal Impact: $4,200,000 from Brownfield Remediation Fund (Fund 4408).

COOK COUNTY BOARD — Item 26-0214 Staff Note
Applicant: Bureau of Asset Management
Location: County-wide
Request: Supplemental appropriation for emergency snow-removal services rendered February 8-19, 2026.
Recommendation: Adopt the supplemental.
Fiscal Impact: $6,800,000 from General Fund unrestricted reserve (Fund 1100).

ATLANTA — Rezoning Z-26-038 Staff Report
Applicant: Eastside Development Co.
Location: 1820 Memorial Drive SE, Atlanta GA 30317
Request: Rezone from R-4 (single-family) to MR-MU (mixed-use) for a 124-unit project.
Recommendation: Defer to next ZRB hearing pending traffic study.
Fiscal Impact: None at this stage.

SEATTLE OFFICE OF LABOR STANDARDS — Council Bill 121-2026 Staff Report
Applicant: Office of Labor Standards (initiated)
Location: City-wide enforcement scope
Request: Expand civil penalty authority for Title 14 SMC minimum-wage and minimum-compensation violations.
Recommendation: Pass — aligns penalties with comparable West Coast jurisdictions.
Fiscal Impact: Net positive — projected to recover $1.4M annually in penalties; funds OLS investigations.

gold_json.fiscal_impact: Net positive — projected $1.4M/yr in recovered penalties
